query:
-- Deletar mensagens das conversas do número pessoal 5517988112791
DELETE m FROM messages m
JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id
JOIN customers cu ON c.customerId = cu.id
WHERE cu.whatsappId LIKE '%5517988112791%';

-- Fechar conversas ativas para forçar nova conversa limpa
UPDATE conversations c
JOIN customers cu ON c.customerId = cu.id
SET c.isActive = 0
WHERE cu.whatsappId LIKE '%5517988112791%';
